tagline: Environmental Remediation Company You Can Trust

hero.headline: 65 Years Protecting Long Island Homes
hero.sub_headline: Family-owned since 1960, Clear River Environmental delivers expert plumbing, septic, cesspool, sewer, and environmental remediation services across Nassau and Suffolk Counties. No surprise bills, guaranteed pricing, and a 2-hour emergency response you can count on.
checkmarks: No Surprise Bills — Written Estimates on Every Job

services.headline: Complete Environmental & Plumbing Solutions
services.subtitle: From emergency plumbing repairs to full environmental remediation, our licensed team handles every job with professional-grade equipment and transparent pricing.

cards.title: Plumbing Services
cards.description: Emergency repairs, water heaters, sump pumps, gas lines, oil tanks, winterization, slab leak repairs, frozen pipe restoration, and backflow certification for homes and businesses.

cards.title: Sewer & Drain Cleaning
cards.description: High-pressure water jetting, video camera inspection, sewer line cleaning, and storm drain maintenance to keep your property flowing and problem-free.

cards.title: Cesspool Pumping & Treatment
cards.description: Professional cesspool pumping, GPS location services, aeration, chemical and bacterial treatment, system inspection, and Suffolk County certifications.

cards.title: Septic System Services
cards.description: Complete septic tank installation, repair, pumping, and inspection services. We maintain your system so you never face a costly emergency replacement.

cards.title: Environmental Remediation
cards.description: Hazardous and non-hazardous waste cleanup, oil tank removal, emergency oil spill response, and bulk liquid waste hauling by certified remediation specialists.

cards.title: Commercial & Municipal
cards.description: Fully compliant environmental and plumbing solutions for businesses, schools, parks, and government facilities throughout Long Island.

steps.title: Call or Request Online
steps.description: Reach us 24/7. Describe your issue and we'll dispatch a licensed technician — often within 2 hours for emergencies.

steps.title: Transparent Inspection & Estimate
steps.description: Our expert arrives with professional-grade camera and GPS equipment, diagnoses the problem, and provides a written, guaranteed estimate before any work begins.

steps.title: Problem Solved, Guaranteed
steps.description: We complete the job with full documentation, clean up thoroughly, and back our work with a satisfaction guarantee. No surprise bills, ever.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1960
about.headline: Three Generations of Long Island Expertise
about.description: Clear River Environmental has been the name Long Island families trust for over 65 years. What started as a small family plumbing operation in Ronkonkoma has grown into a full-service environmental company with a fleet of modern pumping trucks, camera inspection systems, and GPS location equipment. We still operate with the same values our founders built this company on: honest pricing, expert workmanship, and treating every customer like a neighbor.

features.title: EPA & IICRC Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician is fully licensed and certified. We never use subcontractors — only our own trained professionals.

features.title: Modern Professional-Grade Equipment
features.description: Our fleet includes pumping trucks, video camera inspection systems, and GPS location devices for precise diagnostics.

features.title: Written Estimates, Guaranteed Pricing
features.description: You approve the cost before any work begins. The number on your invoice always matches the number we quoted.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every job starts with a written estimate and guaranteed price. You approve the cost before we lift a wrench — and the number on your invoice matches the number we quoted.

guarantee.headline: Our No-Surprise-Bill Guarantee
guarantee.description: We believe you deserve to know exactly what you're paying before work begins. That's why every Clear River job comes with a written, guaranteed estimate. If our final cost exceeds our quote for any reason within our control, we cover the difference. After 65 years in business, our reputation depends on keeping this promise to every customer.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a plumbing or septic emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service with a 2-hour arrival time across Long Island. Call us at (631) 238-3684 and a licensed technician will be dispatched immediately.

faqs.question: Do you provide written estimates before starting work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every job begins with a thorough inspection, a written estimate, and guaranteed pricing. You approve the cost before any work starts, and our final invoice matches our quote.

faqs.question: What areas on Long Island do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Nassau County and Suffolk County, including every town and village on Long Island. Our fleet is based in Ronkonkoma for fast response across the entire island.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every technician on our team is fully licensed and holds EPA, IICRC, and EAA certifications. We never use subcontractors — only our own trained, vetted professionals.

faqs.question: How often should I have my cesspool or septic system serviced?
faqs.answer: We recommend pumping every 2-3 years for most residential systems, though usage and household size can affect timing. We'll inspect your system and recommend the right maintenance schedule for your property.

testimonials.name: Stephen Smith
testimonials.text: We had a swamp gas smell in our house. Clear River's people arrived pretty much immediately and worked for 6 hours to diagnose and resolve the issue.

testimonials.name: Guy Vincel
testimonials.text: The team arrived early. Wenfred, Terrelle and Alex were professional, and courteous. They explained everything clearly and completed my septic tank service efficiently.

testimonials.name: Jerry Silverstein
testimonials.text: Within an hour of cold calling them Jessie came to the rescue. He was knowledgeable and supportive and put us right at ease in a harrowing situation.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate Today
contact.subtitle: Call now or fill out the form below. We respond to every inquiry within 30 minutes during business hours — and dispatch emergency crews 24/7.
benefits: Free written estimate with guaranteed pricing
No obligation, no pressure, no surprise bills

footer.description: Clear River Environmental has served Long Island families and businesses since 1960. Licensed, certified, and committed to transparent pricing on every plumbing, septic, cesspool, sewer, and environmental remediation job.
footer.service_area: Serving Long Island, Nassau County, Suffolk County & Greater New York
